name: Gaia Triage
description: Triage and audit GitHub issues for the Gaia Skill Tree project. Helps identify stale issues, gather evidence from the codebase, and manage issue lifecycle via GitHub CLI.
conditions: Requires access to the mbtiongson1/gaia-skill-tree repository and GitHub CLI (gh) for execution.

evidence.notes: Project-specific triage workflow implementation for Gaia issue pruning.
